audit_items.proof_trace: The invariant is enforced at runtime via SetProposerLookahead (validates length on L18-19), but InitializeFromProtoUnsafeFulu bypasses this check by directly copying the protobuf field without validation (L649-652). States deserialized from SSZ or loaded from the database can have arbitrary proposer lookahead lengths, violating the (MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1)*SLOTS_PER_EPOCH invariant.
audit_items.attack_scenario: An attacker provides a malicious checkpoint state via SSZ with proposer_lookahead length != 64. The SSZ deserializer (configfork.go:171) or database loader (state.go:552) calls InitializeFromProtoUnsafeFulu, which accepts the invalid length. Subsequent ProcessProposerLookahead calls assume correct length for array indexing (transition.go:34-35), causing out-of-bounds access or incorrect proposer selection.
